error_handling.summary: All 13 endpoints lacked try/catch. Added try/catch + Logger + InternalServerErrorException to every method in dashboard.service.ts.

query_optimization.summary: 3 queries rewritten to use DB-side aggregation. 7 indexes missing from Prisma schema.

fixes.issue: Loaded ALL orders + items into JS memory for aggregation. Full table scan on OrderItem.
fixes.fix: Rewrote to raw SQL with SUM(oi.quantity) + GROUP BY productId in PostgreSQL. O(n) → O(log n).

fixes.issue: Loaded ALL paid payments into JS memory for Map grouping.
fixes.fix: Rewrote to raw SQL with SUM(amount) + GROUP BY gatewayCode in PostgreSQL.

fixes.issue: Loaded ALL manageStock products into JS memory, then filtered. No LIMIT on initial query. Cannot compare two columns in Prisma where clause.
fixes.fix: Rewrote to raw SQL with stock <= COALESCE(lowStockQty, 0) comparison in PostgreSQL. Added parallel COUNT query. Added LIMIT 20.

missing_indexes.reason: Used by getStats, getAnalytics, getRevenueByPaymentMethod, getTodayKpi. Date-range filtering on unindexed column = seq scan.
Used by getRevenueByPaymentMethod (WHERE status='PAID'), getPendingPayments, getTodayKpi.
Used by getStats (count), getNewCustomers (findMany). 5M users × seq scan = slow.
Used by getActivityLog (ORDER BY updatedAt DESC).

fastify_compat.summary: No Express references found. Uses @nestjs/common decorators compatible with Fastify adapter.

build_verification: PASS — tsc --noEmit shows 0 dashboard errors. Jest dashboard test passes (1/1).
